evals.prompt: build me a component for the account record page that lists the account's open cases in a table with a refresh button. should look native, our org is very SLDS-strict
evals.expected_output: Complete bundle (html/js/js-meta.xml) with @wire Apex, lightning-datatable or SLDS markup, lightning__RecordPage target, error toast handling

evals.prompt: my child component fires a CustomEvent('rowSelected') but the parent's onrowselected handler never runs, been stuck on this for an hour
evals.expected_output: Explains lowercase event-name rule (rowselected or better a short verb like select), listener naming on+event, bubbles/composed guidance

evals.prompt: code review this lwc js file — I used if:true in the template and querySelector to hide a div, works fine locally but reviewer flagged it
evals.expected_output: Flags deprecated if:true (use lwc:if) and direct DOM manipulation (use reactive property + conditional template); notes @track is rarely needed
